articles.title: GoFundMe launched for Mass. family after teen dies in crash from overpass
articles.description:
Travis Teixeira, 18, of Ashburnham, died after his car fell from a Route 2 overpass in Leominster, police say.

The post GoFundMe launched for Mass. family after teen dies in crash from overpass appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Travis Teixeira, 18, died in a crash from a Route 2 overpass in Leominster.
GoFundMe campaign launched to support Teixeira's family following the tragic incident.
Local community rallies to provide financial assistance for funeral expenses.

articles.title: ‘Stay strong’: David Ortiz’s defiant declaration in the wake of tragedy still resonates with Boston
articles.description:
Ortiz took the field during a somber pregame ceremony and, in his second language, offered 54 words, including exactly the right ones Boston needed to hear.

The post ‘Stay strong’: David Ortiz’s defiant declaration in the wake of tragedy still resonates with Boston appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: David Ortiz delivered a powerful speech during a pregame ceremony in Boston.
He spoke 54 words in his second language, emphasizing resilience.
Ortiz's message continues to inspire unity among Boston residents post-tragedy.

articles.title: Holy Cross student missing after canoe capsizes in Connecticut
articles.description:
Dominick Tucci, 20, was reported missing after a canoe overturned on Lake Hayward in East Haddam, officials say.

The post Holy Cross student missing after canoe capsizes in Connecticut appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Dominick Tucci, a 20-year-old Holy Cross student, is missing after a canoe accident.
The canoe capsized on Lake Hayward in East Haddam, Connecticut.
Search efforts are ongoing, impacting the Holy Cross community and local authorities.

articles.title: The unsolved murder of Kendric Price, a beloved youth mentor gunned down on his childhood street in Dorchester
articles.description:
Kendric Price had seemingly done everything right. He grew up on Greenwood Street in Dorchester, graduated from Buckingham Browne & Nichols School in Cambridge, and got a scholarship to the University of Michigan, where he earned his bachelor’s degree in just three years. The 6-foot-9 Price became a financial analyst and started a nonprofit called Big Business […]

The post The unsolved murder of Kendric Price, a beloved youth mentor gunned down on his childhood street in Dorchester appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Kendric Price, a youth mentor, was murdered on Greenwood Street in Dorchester.
Price, 29, founded the nonprofit Big Business to support local youth.
His death raises concerns about safety and violence in the Dorchester community.

articles.title: The basement of this $4.7 m Lynnfield home known for its holiday decor is like a private club
articles.description:
“During Halloween, thousands of people come by," to see the lawn decor, said the owner. But now, you can peek inside.

The post The basement of this $4.7 m Lynnfield home known for its holiday decor is like a private club appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Owner's $4.7 million Lynnfield home attracts thousands during Halloween for its decor.
Basement features a private club atmosphere, enhancing local holiday festivities.
Increased community engagement as residents visit for unique seasonal experiences.

articles.title: Patriots reportedly set to release QB Joshua Dobbs
articles.description:
Dobbs signed with New England in 2025, and was Drake Maye's backup last season.

The post Patriots reportedly set to release QB Joshua Dobbs appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Patriots plan to release QB Joshua Dobbs, signed in 2025.
Dobbs served as backup to Drake Maye last season.
This move may affect team dynamics and fan expectations in Boston.
